## What changed

Briefly describe the site/content change.

## Checklist

- [ ] I edited the smallest relevant file, usually one file in `_data/`.
- [ ] Dates use `YYYY-MM-DD`, or `YYYY-01-01` if only the year is known.
- [ ] Links are public and working.
- [ ] Notes are short, neutral, and relevant to AI/ML in survey research.
- [ ] I did not add private personal information.
